metadata.defaultTitle: Groware — Revenue Analytics for Digital Businesses
metadata.defaultDescription: Revenue, MRR, acquisition channels and P&L in one dashboard. 14 integrated gateways: Stripe, Kiwify, Hotmart, Asaas, PayPal and more. For SaaS, infoproducers and e-commerce.
